DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT MURAL MEDIA, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES IS CONTINUED TO JULY 16, 2012 AT 9:00 AM TO BE HEARD BY PRO TEM JUDGE ANTHONY SCHOENBERG. THE MOVING PARTIES DID NOT PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302. IF DEFENDANTS WISH TO HAVE THEIR MOTION HEARD, THEY SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 ON MONDAY, JULY 9, 2012 AT 4:00 PM. SINCE PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO FILE ANY PAPERS IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION, THEY MAY NOT USE THIS ADDITIONAL WEEK TO FILE OPPOSITION PAPERS, AND THIS MOTION WILL BE DEEMED UNOPPOSED. PRO TEM JUDGE: ANTHONY SCHOENBERG; NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Continued To Jul-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT MURAL MEDIA, LLC's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is continued to July 16, 2012 at 9:00 am to be heard by Pro Tem Judge Anthony Schoenberg. The moving parties did not provide courtesy copies of their moving papers to Department 302. If defendants wish to have their motion heard, they shall provide courtesy copies of their moving papers to Department 302 on Monday, July 9, 2012 at 4:00 pm. Since Plaintiffs failed to file any papers in opposition to the motion, they may not use this additional week to file opposition papers, and this motion will be deemed unopposed. Pro Tem Judge: Anthony Schoenberg; Not reported.
